metadata.title: Shame (12" Disco Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:58.77] Shame,
[00:59.88] Burning, you keep my whole body yearning
[01:03.86] You got me so confused
[01:05.76] It's a shame
[01:07.70] Sometimes I think I'm going insane
[01:10.98] But still I wanna stay
[01:14.13] Wrapped in your arms
[01:15.61] Is where I wanna be, wanna be
[01:21.18] Wrapped in your arms
[01:23.16] That's my high, my high
[01:27.33] Shame, ooh
[01:29.20] My mother says you're playing a game
[01:32.76] And what you do to me is a
[01:34.41] Shame
[01:35.97] Ooh, gonna love you just the same
[01:39.91] Mama just don't understand
[01:42.77] Wrapped in your arms
[01:44.68] Is where I wanna be, wanna be
[01:49.19] Wrapped in your arms
[01:51.98] That's my high, my high
[01:56.10] I can't get enough, ooh baby
[02:00.64] Enough of that magic touch
[02:03.41] Love is in my heart
[02:08.92] Tearing the rules apart
[02:11.78] So, why should I be ashamed
[02:16.40] Only love can be to blame
[02:19.66] If we lose our love it's a
[02:21.05] Shame
[02:22.35] Ooh, I wouldn't want to live with the pain
[02:26.65] Gonna stay forever
[02:29.28] Wrapped in your arms
[02:31.32] Is where I wanna be, wanna be
[02:36.13] Wrapped in your arms
[02:38.63] That's my high, my high
[02:42.98] Shame
[02:44.03] Ooh, only love can be to blame
[02:48.20] If we lose our love it's a
[02:49.93] Shame
[02:51.04] Ooh, I wouldn't wanna live with the pain
[02:57.29] Shame
[03:21.18] Ain't no reason for me to need to wait
[03:23.95] Ooh, ooh it's a shame
[03:27.99]
